news.t: Why dividend income may have its day in uncertain stock and bond market

holdings.infoBox: TDVG is an equity ETF with a total of 94 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 5.16%, Microsoft at 4.55%, Broadcom at 4.14%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 3.06%, and Visa Inc. at 2.64%.

overview.description: The T. Rowe Price Dividend Growth ETF (TDVG) is an exchange-traded fund. The ETF currently has 1356.36m in AUM and 98 holdings. TDVG is an actively-managed, non-transparent fund of global, large- and mid-cap companies with sustainable, above-average growth in earnings and dividends TDVG was launched on Aug 4, 2020 and is issued by T. Rowe Price.
